mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM ai_follow_up_plan p INNER JOIN register r ON p.register_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{patientId} OR r.case_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientId}) ORDER BY p.creation_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_follow_up_plan SET register_id = #{registerId}, prescription_id = #{prescriptionId}, follow_up_day = #{followUpDay}, planned_date = #{plannedDate}, follow_up_type = #{followUpType}, content_template = #{contentTemplate}, plan_status = #{planStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
